introSection: Mind Eraser is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA. It is a standard Suspended Looping Coaster from Vekoma.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On November 17, 1996, Darien Lake announced that they would be adding Mind Eraser. The ride officially opened on May 17, 1997. It has the same color scheme as Mind Eraser at Elitch Gardens and had the same color shame as Mind Eraser at Six Flags New England before the latter reopened as Riddler Revenge in 2018, with new trains and a different color scheme.

In 2024, Mind Eraser was closed for refurbishment. It was repainted and the trains were replaced.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Mind Eraser is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Six Flags Darien Lake in Darien Center, New York, USA. It is a standard Suspended Looping Coaster from Vekoma.

On November 17, 1996, Darien Lake announced that they would be adding Mind Eraser. The ride officially opened on May 17, 1997. It has the same color scheme as Mind Eraser at Elitch Gardens and had the same color shame as Mind Eraser at Six Flags New England before the latter reopened as Riddler Revenge in 2018, with new trains and a different color scheme.

In 2024, Mind Eraser was closed for refurbishment. It was repainted and the trains were replaced.



2 trains with 10 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 20 riders per train.
